task: place the milk dairy in the gray bowl
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A blue bowl is on the wooden floor. A blue tray with a gray bowl and an orange is on the right. A yellow bottle (milk dairy) is on the floor near the tray. The bottle is small and cylindrical. STRATEGY - First, reach for the yellow bottle, grasp it, then transport it to the gray bowl, and place it inside. Failure modes include dropping the bottle during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the bottle body; Step 2 grasp the bottle body for secure hold; Step 3 transport above the gray bowl; Step 4 lower and place inside the bowl.

Goal: inside(yellow_bottle, gray_bowl)
Scene: yellow_bottle, blue_bowl, blue_tray, gray_bowl, orange, table
Step 1: reach(yellow_bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow bottle
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_bottle, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_bottle) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow bottle
  contact: holding(yellow_bottle) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_bottle)
Step 3: transport(yellow_bottle -> gray_bowl)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the gray bowl
  spatial: above(yellow_bottle, gray_bowl, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_bottle)
  done_when: above(yellow_bottle, gray_bowl, 0.05)
Step 4: place(yellow_bottle -> gray_bowl)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the gray bowl
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_bottle, gray_bowl) [completion]; released(yellow_bottle) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_bottle) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_bottle, gray_bowl) AND released(yellow_bottle)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow bottle
the body of the yellow bottle
an empty area inside the gray bowl
an empty area inside the gray bowl
